name: GIGABYTE B550M DS3H AC Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - DVI-D - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 802.11ac (B550M DS3H AC)
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M DS3H AC Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with B550 chipset, PCIe 4.0, and DDR4 support.
